### 2305438
**Total Drama Island S01E01 - Meet the Victims**  
TV-PG 🔒 22:02  
⌛ June 27, 2026 at 23:59:00 EDT  
[Open in app](https://cnvideo.sercomkc.org/redirector.html?type=cnapp&seriesid=2305437&titleid=2305438&mediaid=7e358630ead54a726a1deea6ae7bd768bf400ed6) or on the web: https://www.cartoonnetwork.com/video/total-drama-island/meet-the-victims-episode.html  
seriesid=`2305437` titleid=`2305438` mediaid=`7e358630ead54a726a1deea6ae7bd768bf400ed6`  
_Chris welcomes 16 new campers back to the original island and divides them into two teams who face-off in a blindfolded challenge that's sure to cause pain._  
<a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305438_001_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305438_001_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305438_002_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305438_002_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305438_003_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305438_003_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305438_004_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305438_004_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305438_005_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305438_005_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305438_006_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305438_006_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305438_007_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305438_007_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305438_008_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305438_008_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305438_009_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305438_009_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305438_010_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305438_010_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a>
### 2305439
**Total Drama Island S01E02 - Pirates of the Cabbagean**  
TV-PG 🔒 22:02  
⌛ June 27, 2026 at 23:59:00 EDT  
[Open in app](https://cnvideo.sercomkc.org/redirector.html?type=cnapp&seriesid=2305437&titleid=2305439&mediaid=f86c52a1b8d325c09d164a002dc73ab1fbaa31f5) or on the web: https://www.cartoonnetwork.com/video/total-drama-island/pirates-of-the-cabbagean-episode.html  
seriesid=`2305437` titleid=`2305439` mediaid=`f86c52a1b8d325c09d164a002dc73ab1fbaa31f5`  
_Our two teams go to war, firing cabbages from cannons at each other from their respective pirate ships. The first team to sink the other will be the winner, but someone takes a very personal interest in one specific target._  
<a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305439_001_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305439_001_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305439_002_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305439_002_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305439_003_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305439_003_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305439_004_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305439_004_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305439_005_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305439_005_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305439_006_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305439_006_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305439_007_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305439_007_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305439_008_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305439_008_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305439_009_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305439_009_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305439_010_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305439_010_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a>
